message:
fix(comparison): Assign inferred donors to genomic islands in HGT tracer

Fix missing data propagation in analyzeHGTProvenance() where donor
candidates were computed but not attached to the genomic island objects.

Problem:
The inferDonors() function returns an array of DonorCandidate objects,
and this array was being used to populate PassportStamp.donorDistribution
and PassportStamp.donor (best match), but the GenomicIsland.donors
property remained empty.

Solution:
Added assignment: island.donors = donors
This line now populates the island's donors array with the inferred
candidates, ensuring the data is available both in the stamp and
in the island object itself.

Impact:
- HGTOverlay can now access donors directly from island objects
- Consistent data model where islands contain their own donor info
- Enables future island-centric views without traversing stamps

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
